# TeamTango

> TeamTango is an all-in-one team engagement and culture platform for remote, hybrid, and in-office teams: a team wall for highlights and kudos, automated birthday and work anniversary celebrations, PTO and time-off management with approval workflows, engagement insights, and visual org charts. Currently in development — a public waitlist is open at https://teamtango.io.

## What TeamTango does

- **Team Wall & Smart Posts**: a social feed where teams share highlights, kudos, and challenges. Posts are auto-categorized by AI and support @mentions.
- **Recognition & Reactions**: peer-to-peer kudos with @mentions and emoji reactions (heart, thumbs-up, funny, comments) to make appreciation visible and persistent.
- **Automated Celebrations**: birthdays and work anniversaries are detected automatically and announced to the team, so milestones are never missed.
- **PTO Management**: time-off requests with approval workflows, leave balances per leave type, half-day support, public-holiday awareness per country/region, and a team availability calendar.
- **Team Insights**: engagement analytics — kudos sent, posts created, engagements, participation rate — with week-over-week trends.
- **Org Management**: departments, teams, and a searchable people directory.

## Who it is for

Remote, hybrid, and in-office teams that care about culture, from startups to mid-size companies. Team leads keep recognition visible; HR / people-ops manage time off and read engagement signals; everyone uses the wall to stay connected.

## How it compares

TeamTango complements chat tools (Slack, Microsoft Teams) rather than replacing them. Chat is ephemeral — recognition scrolls away within hours. TeamTango is a persistent culture layer where kudos, celebrations, and milestones stay visible, and where time off and engagement are managed properly.

## Status and access

- Status: in development, launching soon
- Access: join the waitlist at https://teamtango.io (email only)
- Pricing: announced at launch; waitlist members get early access first

## Links

- [Waitlist and product overview](https://teamtango.io/): the landing page, including a feature FAQ
- [Roadmap](https://teamtango.io/roadmap): what's shipped (team wall, kudos, events, gift funds, time off, org management), in progress (AI post categorization, insights, real-time feed), and planned (automations, integrations, multi-language)
- [Changelog](https://teamtango.io/changelog): dated release history, also available as RSS at https://teamtango.io/feed.xml
- [TeamTango vs Workvivo](https://teamtango.io/vs/workvivo): Workvivo targets enterprises; TeamTango is the lightweight alternative for small/mid-size teams with built-in time-off management
- [TeamTango vs Slack](https://teamtango.io/vs/slack): TeamTango complements chat rather than replacing it — a persistent culture layer for recognition, celebrations, and PTO
